message:
test(canonicalize): Add comprehensive canonicalization equivalence tests (Opt 6.3)

Add 35 tests for the streaming canonicalization implementation:

Determinism tests (5):
- Simple and repeated canonicalization
- Hash determinism for content and hex output
- Full pipeline (canonicalize + hash)

Property-based tests with proptest (8):
- Deterministic output (500 cases)
- Hash stability (500 cases)
- Truncation bound enforcement
- No double spaces in output
- Bold marker removal
- Header stripping
- Link text preservation

Edge case tests (20):
- Empty string, whitespace only, single chars
- Unicode: NFC/NFD equivalence, combining chars, RTL, emoji
- Code blocks: exact boundary, over boundary, unclosed
- Markdown: deeply nested, special chars
- Low-signal filtering: exact matches vs substrings
- Line endings: Unix, Windows, Mac, mixed
- Truncation: very long, exactly MAX_EMBED_CHARS

Integration tests (2):
- Realistic agent log content
- Realistic tool output

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-gngt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
